method: WCAG 2.x contrast computed from live computed CSS colors (deterministic, no screenshot sampling error). visual-qa-toolkit contrast math; visual-qa-ui-design + visual-qa-accessibility lenses.

chrome_text_failures_AA.sample: section labels / sublabels / nav-rail / dashboard metadata
chrome_text_failures_AA.note: muted token too dim for normal/small text on dark surfaces

blocker.finding: On-canvas node titles + labels render dark on the permanently-dark graph pane
blocker.rootCause: GraphCanvas pins React Flow colorMode="dark" (pane stays black) while node-label text uses --nx-fg, which flips to a dark value under :root.light.
blocker.userReachable: Not via UI yet — no light-theme toggle is wired; reachable by adding `light` class to <html>. Latent DS defect since tokens.css ships .light as a supported override.
